title: Why Most Web Apps Fail (And How to Build Ones That Succeed)
excerpt: Many web apps fail not because of bad code, but because of bad thinking. Let’s break down what actually matters.
content:
The Real Problem

Most developers focus too much on technology and not enough on user value.

What Actually Matters

  • Solving a real problem
  • Simple and intuitive UX
  • Performance and reliability

My Approach

When building platforms like Eventlink or management systems, I focus on usability and business logic first.

Takeaway

Good code is important, but useful products win.
